items.caption: A graphic art print on canvas, which is a representation of a robot from the "famous robots series" inspired by "the hitchhiker's guide to the galaxy" by douglas adams. the robot is depicted in a white color with a simplistic design, standing against a solid blue background. the print is framed by a white border and includes text that reads "the hitchhiker's guide to the galaxy (<person>)" and "graphic art print on canvas." the style of the image is graphic and modern, with a focus on the central robot figure.
